# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Path to the custom build script within the repository'
        required: true
        default: './build.sh'
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Custom deployment command to execute'
        required: false
        default: ''
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, prod)'
        required: false
        default: 'dev'

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, x64] # Example labels, adjust for your self-hosted runner configuration
    environment:
      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }} # Dynamically select environment
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set execute permissions for build script
        run: chmod +x ${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}

      - name: Run custom build script
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}

      - name: Run custom deployment command
        if: github.event.inputs.deploy_command != ''
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}
